meta.title: Ordex — Every order. Every carrier. One gateway.
meta.description: Ordex plugs Syrian e-commerce stores into every carrier — one API for routing, dispatch, live tracking and COD reconciliation. We're not the trains. We're the rails.

hero.sub: Ordex plugs your store into every carrier in Syria. We route, dispatch, track, and reconcile cash on delivery — while you keep selling.

strategy.label: The idea
strategy.copy: Carriers drive the trucks. Ordex builds the rails they run on — routing, dispatch, live tracking, and COD settlement through one clean layer between your store and every delivery company in the country.

f1.title: One API
f1.desc: Create a shipment in one call. Ordex picks the right carrier and returns a live tracking link.

f2.title: Carrier OS
f2.desc: Driver app, dispatch board, GPS and COD tools — free for carriers that don't have their own tech.

f3.title: Store connect
f3.desc: Salla, Zid, Shopify, WooCommerce or Instagram DMs — orders flow in from wherever you sell.

f4.title: Tracking + COD
f4.desc: Live tracking for your customers. Reconciled cash-on-delivery settlements for you.

a1.title: Instagram shops
a1.desc: Forward an order from your DMs. Ordex routes it, creates tracking, and keeps your customer updated.

a2.title: Physical retailers
a2.desc: Sell in-store and deliver same-day with pickup scheduling, labels, and zone-based carrier selection.

a3.title: E-commerce platforms
a3.desc: Connect Shopify, WooCommerce, Salla, or a custom backend with clean endpoints and webhooks.

a4.title: Enterprise B2B
a4.desc: Bulk dispatch, signed delivery, custom SLAs, COD reconciliation, and dedicated routing logic.

api.label: Developers
api.heading: Ship in one call.
api.sub: A clean REST API with webhooks. Sandbox keys in minutes, not meetings.
api.comment1: Create a delivery in one call
api.comment2: Routed to the right carrier in under 200ms

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: The honest questions.
faq.q1: How is Ordex different from using carriers directly?
faq.a1: One contract, one API, one dashboard for every order — instead of stitching together separate carrier portals, spreadsheets, and phone calls.
faq.q2: Do you cover all of Syria?
faq.a2: The platform is built around all 14 governorates, with routing by fastest, cheapest, or closest carrier preference.
faq.q3: How does cash on delivery work?
faq.a3: Ordex aggregates carrier settlements into one wallet with daily ledger entries and reconciliation views, with a 5% variance tolerance before an order is flagged.
faq.q4: Is this too much for a small shop?
faq.a4: No. The Starter flow is designed for a one-person Instagram shop — no website and no engineering team needed.
faq.q5: Can a carrier without any software join?
faq.a5: Yes. Ordex Carrier OS gives them a driver app, dispatch board, GPS tracking, and COD tools for free — in exchange for carrying merchant orders routed through Ordex.
